name: WordPress AI content generator
description: Uses Claude to generate a complete blog article from a topic prompt, including title, HTML content, excerpt, tags, and meta description, then publishes it to WordPress as a draft post.

source.originalName: Automate content generator for WordPress with DeepSeek R1

topic.description: Topic or prompt for the article (e.g. '10 Best Productivity Tips for Remote Workers')

tone.description: Writing tone: professional, casual, authoritative, conversational

wordCount.description: Target word count for the article

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for article generation
Run Claude AI for article generation
Publish article to WordPress as draft
